description: Capabilities document with an unknown top-level field — duplicate of caps-006 from a different angle. The CapabilitiesDocument top level is OPEN (additionalProperties: true; see acdp-capabilities.schema.json line 105 and the openness map in RFC-ACDP-0007 §3.3.1). Consumers MUST tolerate. This fixture is the explicit positive companion to schema-001/002/003 in the schema-openness series.

expected.rationale: Capabilities is forward-compat-open at the top level. A v0.1.0 consumer must continue to read the document, route 'supports_receipts' into a catch-all extension map, and proceed. Cross-reference: the `limits` SUB-OBJECT is closed (additionalProperties: false at line 102) — caps-005 covers that case via the value constraint on max_embedded_bytes.
